diff: By Friday, 16:00 UTC of week 2, the Prime Agent must deliver the final Prime Spell payload in the #govops Discord channel. The delivery must include the Prime Spell address, codehash, and execution type. The execution type must be specified in accordance with [A.1.10.2.3.2.3 - Execution Of Agent Spells](5b0fd894-094e-4b0c-91ca-c5b59b710c0c).
